title: Test: Add end-to-end tests
original_text: Added end-to-end tests with Playwright. Implemented E2E tests for critical user flows. Added E2E tests for authentication and authorization. Implemented E2E tests for checkout process. Added E2E test reporting and screenshots. Result: E2E tests pass.
expected_subject: test(e2e): add end-to-end tests with Playwright
expected_body_lines: - Implement E2E tests for critical user flows
- Add E2E tests for authentication and authorization
- Implement E2E tests for checkout process
- Add E2E test reporting and screenshots
expected_command: git commit -m "test(e2e): add end-to-end tests with Playwright"
